rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (2/10) and rest on the same substantive reasoning: missing 5-10 years of hands-on C++, no Windows/SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no Fixed Income/Capital Markets/Investment Banking domain expertise. The wording differs slightly but the concerns, strengths, and conclusion are equivalent. Notably, neither evaluation references the career gap at all, so the changed gap end-date drove no penalty, no new concern, and no shifted reasoning. The differences are ordinary rewording noise.
